results.title: Political affiliations must not shield unethical practices in hospitals: Shama Obaed
results.description: The state minister noted that the proposed FY27 national budget places the highest priority on the health sector

results.title: Global trade in cocaine, methamphetamine is booming, UN drug report shows
results.description: – The global trade in illicit drugs is booming, with cocaine production ‌and seizures of methamphetamine at an all-time high, a United Nations report showed on Friday, warning of a surge in new drugs filling a gap left by the collapse in heroin supply. Cocaine production surged to roughly 4,100 metric tons of pure ​product [...]
